---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for Vigie
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. e.g., "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Vigie to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope check

Vigie intentionally stays narrow (Slack agent for elder watch during heatwaves).
Does this feature fit that scope?

- [ ] Yes, directly improves elder watch during heatwaves
- [ ] Yes, improves Vigie's technical quality without changing scope
- [ ] No, but useful for related use cases (please explain)

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to relevant APIs, etc.
